prompt: In Mail, create a Smart Mailbox titled 'KinBench This Month' that shows messages received in the current month (Mailbox > New Smart Mailbox). After creating, write 'smart-mailbox-created' to ~/Desktop/kinbench/151-smart-confirm.txt (Smart mailbox plist is TCC-restricted; confirmation file is the eval's paper trail). Fast path: `cerebellum 'mail create_smart_mailbox "KinBench This Month" ~/Desktop/kinbench/151-smart-confirm.txt'`.
